name: @wtprograms/material-design
description: @wtprograms/material-design is a library of web components and styles for Material 3.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run index && npm run build:scss && npm run build:styles && npm run build:css-ts && npm run build:tsc
scripts.watch: npm run clean && npm run index && npm run build:styles && concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "tsc,scss" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold" "npm:build:tsc -- --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "npm:build:scss -- --watch" "npm:build:css-ts -- -w"

author: WT Programs
